title: HOW
WE WORK.
hero.intro: No endless discovery phases. No let's explore. We move.

cta.title: READY TO BUILD SOMETHING THAT WORKS?

sections.title: THE OPERATING SEQUENCE
sections.body: You bring the problem. We dissect the constraints. We design the architecture. We build, test, iterate, and ship something that works.

cards.title: YOU BRING THE PROBLEM
cards.description: What needs to work? Where does it break? What environment does it survive? What outcome matters?

cards.title: WE DISSECT THE CONSTRAINTS
cards.description: Compute, latency, data quality, deployment surface, model reliability, language, and operational failure modes.

cards.title: WE DESIGN THE ARCHITECTURE
cards.description: We choose the stack, define state boundaries, decide what the model does, and decide what deterministic code must own.

cards.title: WE BUILD, TEST, ITERATE
cards.description: The system gets built against real constraints and refined until it can survive the conditions it was designed for.

cards.title: WE SHIP SOMETHING THAT WORKS
cards.description: No sandbox theater. No maybe. A deployed system that can be measured.

sections.title: NO THEATER
sections.body: We do not sell long discovery engagements, vague transformation decks, or a roadmap that never touches production. We build.
